sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَخْبَارَ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ خِلَالِ الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi danas čitaju vijesti putem brzih informativnih portala.
sentences.translationEn: People read the news today through fast news websites.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُوَفِّرُ مَعْلُومَاتٍ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ فِي لَحَظَاتٍ قَلِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Oni pružaju informacije o svijetu u samo nekoliko trenutaka.
sentences.translationEn: They provide information about the world in a few moments.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ لَا بُدَّ مِنْ مَعْرِفَةِ الْمَصَادِرِ الصَّحِيحَةِ لِتَجَنُّبِ الْأَخْبَارِ الْكَاذِبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali neophodno je poznavati tačne izvore kako bi se izbjegle lažne vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: But it is necessary to know the correct sources to avoid fake news.
